creator: utisoft@hotmail.com
text:
I'm aware that this is one of many that I've thrown at portmgr lately 
(sorry...) but it's pretty trivial...

I'm literally adding ${JOT}:

# On a csupped ports tree before my patch
[crees@zeus]~% grep -R '\${JOT}' /usr/ports
[crees@zeus]~%

Please would someone take a look?

Chris

--
